Emine Yildirim’s Movie Wins International Success!

Our esteemed lecturer Emine Yıldırım, who teaches screenplay courses at the Department of Radio, Television and Cinema, has achieved significant international success with her film “Apollon by Day, Athena by Night” (Apollon by Day, Athena by Night).

The film won the Best Film Award in the Asian Future section of the 37th Tokyo Film Festival, where only 10 outstanding Asian productions were invited. This prestigious award is given to films that represent the future of Asian cinema.

In addition, “Apollo by Day, Athena by Night” was also awarded the SİYAD New Perspectives Award at the 44th Istanbul Film Festival.

We congratulate her on this inspiring achievement and wish her continued success!
